CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value1 INT, value2 INT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value1, value2) VALUES (1, 1, 2);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value1, value2) VALUES (2, -1, 2);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value1, value2) VALUES (3, 0, 0);
SELECT value1 + value2 FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT value1 + value2 AS sum FROM test_table WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT (SELECT value1 FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) + (SELECT value2 FROM test_table WHERE id = 2) AS total;
SELECT a.value1 + b.value2 AS combined FROM test_table a JOIN test_table b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.id = 1;
SELECT value1 + value2 FROM test_table WHERE value1 > 0 OR value2 < 0;
SELECT value1 + (SELECT SUM(value2) FROM test_table WHERE id < 3) AS nested_sum FROM test_table WHERE id = 3;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INT, value INT);
SELECT t.value + (SELECT SUM(value) FROM another_table) AS total_sum FROM test_table t WHERE t.id = 1;
SELECT CASE WHEN value1 < 0 THEN value1 + value2 ELSE value1 - value2 END AS conditional_result FROM test_table;
WITH temp_sum AS (SELECT value1 + value2 AS sum FROM test_table) SELECT AVG(sum) FROM temp_sum;
